subcodes.first_line: Say: O My Afnán! Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Aim and my Beloved! Thou beholdest one of Thy leaves that hath turned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی یا افنانی سبحانک یا الهی و مقصودی و محبوبی تری ورقه من اوراقک توجهت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
